thread.content: [Product Manager] Let's add a live activity feed on the dashboard that updates instantly whenever a team member edits a shared document.

assumptions.FE: Needs WebSockets or Long-Polling to handle 'real-time' updates without freezing the React thread.
assumptions.BE: Must implement strict rate-limiting on the API; querying on every page refresh will crash the server.
assumptions.DS: Browsing habits are unstructured text. The model needs an async queue because inference takes 3-5 seconds.
